_comment: Cost-aware Claude Code defaults for Amazon Bedrock. DEFAULT is Sonnet 5 (prev. Sonnet 4.6) — the cheap everyday driver — with Opus 4.8, Fable 5, Haiku 4.5, and the opusplan hybrid all one `/model` keystroke away (so escalating to frontier reasoning for a hard task is deliberate, never the silent baseline; forgetting leaves you on the cheap path). Uses ALIASES in `model`/`availableModels`; the ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_*_MODEL env pins below resolve each alias to the exact Bedrock inference-profile ID (on Bedrock the bare aliases otherwise resolve to OLDER versions — opus->4.6, sonnet->4.5 — so the pins are required). SUBAGENT MODEL is intentionally NOT hard-pinned: CLAUDE.md tiers subagents by value (mechanical->haiku, substantive->sonnet, judge/synthesis->inherit), preserving quality on the deep-research/verification agents this user relies on. opusplan = Opus plans, Sonnet executes; available on demand but not the default because its Opus plan-phase re-reads context at Opus rates every session. effortLevel 'high' is the default for all supported models (Sonnet 5, Sonnet 4.6, Opus 4.8, Fable 5) — listed here explicitly for documentation; thinking fires adaptively so cost impact is proportional to task complexity. DEPLOY TO (macOS): /Library/Application Support/ClaudeCode/managed-settings.json
